label: Damage graphic data
description: Damage overlay textures and regions for a graphic. Maps to Verse.DamageGraphicData in RimWorld source.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether damage overlays are shown on this graphic. Defaults to true.

rect.label: Rect
rect.description: Default damage region as (x, y, width, height) for all rotations.

rectN.label: Rect north
rectN.description: Damage region override for north-facing rotation as (x, y, width, height).

rectE.label: Rect east
rectE.description: Damage region override for east-facing rotation as (x, y, width, height).

rectS.label: Rect south
rectS.description: Damage region override for south-facing rotation as (x, y, width, height).

rectW.label: Rect west
rectW.description: Damage region override for west-facing rotation as (x, y, width, height).

scratches.label: Scratches
scratches.description: List of texture paths for scratch overlay graphics. Each <li> is a texture path.

cornerTL.label: Corner top-left
cornerTL.description: Texture path for the top-left corner damage overlay.

cornerTR.label: Corner top-right
cornerTR.description: Texture path for the top-right corner damage overlay.

cornerBL.label: Corner bottom-left
cornerBL.description: Texture path for the bottom-left corner damage overlay.

cornerBR.label: Corner bottom-right
cornerBR.description: Texture path for the bottom-right corner damage overlay.

edgeLeft.label: Edge left
edgeLeft.description: Texture path for the left edge damage overlay.

edgeRight.label: Edge right
edgeRight.description: Texture path for the right edge damage overlay.

edgeTop.label: Edge top
edgeTop.description: Texture path for the top edge damage overlay.

edgeBot.label: Edge bottom
edgeBot.description: Texture path for the bottom edge damage overlay.
